items.title: Personalized Home Quality Release
items.description: Release focused on improving home ranking quality, session starts, and cross-format discovery for listeners.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of sessions that turn into purposeful listening.
Increase plays launched from personalized home surfaces.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve Premium consideration by making the core experience feel more valuable.

productBricks.change: Improve ranking orchestration and context-sensitive modules.
Improve next-best recommendation quality across formats.
Tighten editorial placement logic for launch moments.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated listener iOS home treatments.
Roll out updated listener Android home treatments.

items.title: Premium Value and Retention Release
items.description: Release focused on plan clarity, entitlement reliability, and better save-and-return loops for frequent listeners.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve repeat listening through better continuity and saved-state utility.
Increase plan adoption through clearer value communication and lower purchase friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce avoidable churn from entitlement and billing confusion.

productBricks.change: Improve plan comparison and upsell timing.
Improve session continuity and account-state handoffs.
Improve save, recovery, and collection visibility.

deliveryChannels.change: Release improved web Premium and library flows.
Release supporting entitlement and playback services.

items.title: Artist Fan Conversion Release
items.description: Release focused on better release readiness, targeted fan activation, and clearer artist-team analytics.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of targeted listeners who stream new releases after campaign exposure.
Improve how effectively new releases create repeat listeners and followers.

businessKPIs.kpi: Artist team monthly active campaign rate
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase recurring product usage by artist and label teams.

productBricks.change: Improve release-readiness checks and launch guidance.
Improve fan targeting and campaign setup controls.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated Spotify for Artists campaign workflow.

items.title: Creator Earnings and Measurement Release
items.description: Release focused on creator monetization transparency, audience funnel visibility, and stronger advertiser outcome reporting.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the amount of creator inventory that can be monetized on-platform.
Improve confidence in when and why earnings are realized.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase monetizable inventory quality and outcome proof for advertisers.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of spend tied to outcome reporting.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase repeat spend through stronger measurement trust.

productBricks.change: Improve creator earnings and eligibility transparency.
Improve creator funnel analytics and conversion reporting.
Improve advertiser measurement coverage and reporting reliability.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated creator and advertiser reporting views.
Release expanded reporting and measurement partner outputs.
